title: Directors’ identity verification for an overseas company (OS VS01)
body: "All overseas company directors must have:   completed identity verification their Companies House personal code   You’ll need to file a form OS VS01 for each director, unless you have already provided this information. This confirms they have verified their identity.  You must do this by the anniversary of the date the UK establishment was opened. For example, if it was opened on 3 May 1995 you must file by 3 May 2026.   You can only use this form for overseas companies. For UK companies, see Verifying your identity for Companies House.  "
